scenes.visual_note: The GluMira owl nods in greeting
scenes.subtitle_text: GluMira — the science of insulin, made visible.
scenes.voice_text: Hey. Welcome to GluMira — where the science of insulin becomes something you can actually see.

scenes.visual_note: Your insulin's activity curve draws itself
scenes.subtitle_text: Your insulin is always working. Now you can see how.
scenes.voice_text: Your insulin is always working beneath the surface. GluMira shows you the curve — onset, peak, and tail.

scenes.visual_note: Stacking zones glow from green to red
scenes.subtitle_text: See where doses stack. Adjust timing, not guesswork.
scenes.voice_text: When multiple doses overlap, you get stacking. GluMira colour-codes the pressure so you know when to watch.

scenes.subtitle_text: Your dashboard shows IOB, patterns, and glucose — all in one place.
scenes.voice_text: Your dashboard brings it all together. Active insulin, patterns, glucose overlay — everything in one view.

scenes.subtitle_text: Let's get started. Your profile takes two minutes.
scenes.voice_text: Let's get you set up. Your profile takes about two minutes — then the insights begin.
